name: Library Volunteer Agreement
description: Annual volunteer agreement for Friends of the Glastonbury Library used-book sale and general volunteer activities

name: Garden Club Event Waiver
description: Liability and participation waiver for Glastonbury Garden Club events including plant swaps and garden tours

name: Hartford Graduate Institute Guest Lecturer Agreement
description: Guest lecturer services agreement for Hartford Graduate Institute Library Science program sessions

name: Patient Consent and Authorization Form
description: Standard patient consent for treatment, records release, and HIPAA acknowledgment used by Glastonbury and Hartford area medical practices

name: Community Center Event Release Form
description: Participant liability release and photo consent for Glastonbury Community Center hosted events

name: Friends of the Library Membership Agreement
description: Annual membership agreement and volunteer commitment form for Friends of Welles-Turner Memorial Library

name: Glastonbury Garden Club Membership Renewal
description: Annual membership renewal form including dues agreement, code of conduct, and event participation consent

name: Library Meeting Room Use Agreement
description: Agreement governing use of Welles-Turner Memorial Library meeting rooms for book club and community group sessions

name: Dental Treatment Consent Form
description: Patient consent for dental procedures and X-ray authorization at Glastonbury Dental Arts

name: Gentle Yoga Participant Waiver
description: Liability waiver and health disclosure for gentle yoga class participants at Glastonbury Community Center

name: Book Club Facilitator Agreement
description: Agreement for book club session facilitators at Welles-Turner Memorial Library covering conduct and scheduling

name: Church Community Event Volunteer Form
description: Volunteer registration and liability acknowledgment for community events hosted by Glastonbury Church

name: Medical Research Participation Consent
description: Informed consent for participation in medical research studies affiliated with Hartford area health practices

name: Photo and Media Release Form
description: Consent for use of photographs and recordings taken at Glastonbury Garden Club and library public events

name: Hartford Graduate Institute Speaker Evaluation Agreement
description: Post-lecture evaluation consent allowing Hartford Graduate Institute to share session feedback with guest lecturers

name: Pharmacy HIPAA Authorization
description: HIPAA authorization allowing Glastonbury Pharmacy to share prescription information with designated caregivers

name: Community Garden Plot Use Agreement
description: Annual plot use agreement for the Glastonbury Community Garden managed by the Garden Club

name: Library Book Donation Receipt and Agreement
description: Donation acknowledgment and agreement for book contributions to the Welles-Turner Memorial Library collection

name: Emergency Contact and Medical Authorization
description: Emergency contact form and authorization allowing designated contacts to make medical decisions on behalf of the signer

name: Hartford Graduate Institute Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: NDA for guest lecturers covering unpublished research and student information shared during Hartford Graduate Institute sessions
